nasb.text: Then the Lord said to me, “A conspiracy has been found among the men of Judah and among the inhabitants of Jerusalem.

esv.text: Again the Lord said to me, “A conspiracy exists among the men of Judah and the inhabitants of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 耶和華又對我說：“在猶大人和耶路撒冷的居民中間，有背叛的陰謀。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“犹大人和耶路撒冷的居民阴谋背叛我。
